<function_thought>
To accomplish the user's task of creating a new repository named "new_project" and ensuring its contents are the same as "bobolive/json_xml_parsing," I will first create the repository using the `git_create_repo` function. After successfully creating the repository, I will clone the contents of "bobolive/json_xml_parsing" to the local directory. Finally, I will push the cloned contents to the newly created "new_project" repository. The plan is to execute the functions in the order specified.
</function_thought>

<final_answer></final_answer>
